apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of sources of business finance to real-life business scenarios.
Students will be able to calculate the cost of different sources of business finance.
Students will be able to evaluate the suitability of different sources of business finance for a business.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of different sources of business finance on the profitability of a business.
Students will be able to evaluate the relative importance of different sources of business finance for a business.
Students will be able to compare the characteristics of different sources of business finance.
remember: Students will be able to recall the various sources of business finance.
Students will be able to identify the main sources of business finance.
Students will be able to list the different sources of business finance.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of internal and external sources of business finance.
Students will be able to describe the advantages and limitations of different sources of business finance.
Students will be able to differentiate between various sources of business finance.

ncert_objectives: Explain the nature and sources of business finance.
Discuss the role of internal and external sources of finance in a business.
Explain the characteristics and advantages of different sources of business finance.
Describe the methods of raising long-term and short-term funds from external sources.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the sources of business finance and explain how they help a business to achieve its objectives.
Compare the advantages and limitations of different sources of business finance and explain their suitability for a business.
Explain how a business can raise funds from internal and external sources and evaluate the impact of these sources on its profitability.
